case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. FALESOA MANU et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1033 (B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
